reason: Gold patch in solution/solve.sh does not apply to the repository at git commit 5487cfb65a69a308e7c0b29ae666c8a9ddcab159. Multiple files fail to apply: packages/ai/ai/src/AiError.ts (line 162 context mismatch - patch expects line with leading spaces that does not match), packages/ai/ai/src/Chat.ts, EmbeddingModel.ts, LanguageModel.ts, Telemetry.ts similarly fail. This is a test/oracle problem, not an instruction problem. The NOP baseline already fails 13/29 tests due to these gold patch mismatches. Since tests and gold cannot be modified per instructions, this task cannot be reconciled.
